message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "browser" as browser
participant "proxy" as proxy
participant "backend" as backend
participant "component_config" as component_config
participant "subscription_map" as subscription_map
participant "normalized_object_map" as normalized_object_map
participant "normalized_object" as normalized_object

activate browser
activate proxy
activate backend

browser -> proxy: get_state(\nconfiguration_name,\ngeo_bounding_box)
proxy -> backend: +TENANT_HEADER

backend -> component_config: component_config[configuration_name]\n.subscription_usages
component_config --> backend: [ subscription_usage_config ]

backend -> subscription_map: forEach subscription_usage_config.subscription_id
subscription_map --> backend: subscription_map[subscription_id] (= normalized_object_map)

backend -> normalized_object_map: forEach key
normalized_object_map --> backend: normalized_object

backend -> normalized_object: forEach normalized_object:\nif object.in(geo_bounding_box):\n  object.to_dto(\n    subscription_usage_config\n  )
normalized_object --> backend: object_dto

backend --> proxy: [ object_dto ]
proxy --> browser:

deactivate browser
deactivate proxy
deactivate backend
@enduml
